requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240 V / 50 Hz Supply, Type I Plug (AS/NZS 3112)

summary.en: Fiji operates a 240 V / 50 Hz mains supply. The standard socket type is Type I (Australian 3-pin flat-pin plug and socket, per AS/NZS 3112). Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices must be rated and tested for 240 V / 50 Hz operation. Fiji does not operate a mandatory electrical safety certification scheme equivalent to Australia's EESS (Electrical Equipment Safety System) or the RCM mark, but products are expected to comply with relevant AS/NZS electrical safety standards, as Fiji's electrical infrastructure and regulatory reference align with Australian standards. The Fiji Electricity Authority (FEA) oversees electricity regulation. Products using a Chinese Type A flat plug or Type I (Australian-style) plug without neutral pin or other non-conforming configuration must be adapted to AS/NZS 3112.
summary.zh: 斐济采用240V/50Hz市电供电，标准插座类型为I型（澳大利亚三脚扁平插头及插座，符合AS/NZS 3112）。市电供电的无线及物联网设备须经过240V/50Hz运行的额定和测试认证。斐济没有相当于澳大利亚EESS（电气设备安全体系）或RCM标志的强制电气安全认证方案，但由于斐济电气基础设施及监管参考与澳大利亚标准一致，产品须符合相关AS/NZS电气安全标准。斐济电力局（FEA）负责电力监管。使用中国A型扁平插头或不符合AS/NZS 3112规格的其他插头类型的产品，须进行插头改装。
summary.zht: 斐濟採用240V/50Hz市電供電，標準插座類型為I型（澳洲三腳扁平插頭及插座，符合AS/NZS 3112）。市電供電的無線及物聯網設備須經過240V/50Hz運行的額定和測試認證。斐濟沒有相當於澳洲EESS（電氣設備安全體系）或RCM標誌的強制電氣安全認證方案，但由於斐濟電氣基礎設施及監管參考與澳洲標準一致，產品須符合相關AS/NZS電氣安全標準。斐濟電力局（FEA）負責電力監管。使用中國A型扁平插頭或不符合AS/NZS 3112規格的其他插頭類型的產品，須進行插頭改裝。

standards_or_laws: Fiji Electricity Authority (FEA) technical standards — 240 V / 50 Hz supply and electrical equipment requirements
AS/NZS 3112 — Australian/New Zealand standard for plugs and socket-outlets (Type I — referenced in Fiji)
AS/NZS 3820 — Essential requirements for electrical equipment (referenced as good practice in Fiji market context)
AS/NZS 62368.1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety (AS/NZS equivalent of IEC 62368-1)

summary.en: In China, mains-powered electrical and electronic products in the CCC catalogue must obtain CCC certification for electrical safety, tested against applicable GB safety standards. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz. The common plug type is a hybrid Type A/I flat-pin (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002), which does not fully conform to AS/NZS 3112. CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Fiji.
summary.zh: 在中国，列入CCC目录的市电供电电气和电子产品须取得CCC认证以满足电气安全要求，并按适用GB安全标准进行检测。中国采用220V/50Hz供电，常用插头类型为扁平混合式A/I型（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002），与AS/NZS 3112不完全符合。中国CCC电气安全认证在斐济不被认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，列入CCC目錄的市電供電電氣和電子產品須取得CCC認證以滿足電氣安全要求，並按適用GB安全標準進行檢測。中國採用220V/50Hz供電，常用插頭類型為扁平混合式A/I型（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002），與AS/NZS 3112不完全符合。中國CCC電氣安全認證在斐濟不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 / GB 62368.1 — Safety of audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment (IEC 62368-1 aligned)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (electrical safety) for products in the CCC catalogue
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 — Chinese standard for plugs and socket-outlets (220 V / Type A/I)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety approval is not recognised in Fiji. Products designed and certified for China's 220 V / 50 Hz and Type A/I plug must be re-evaluated for Fiji's 240 V / 50 Hz supply and AS/NZS 3112 Type I plug. Voltage tolerance should be verified to ensure the product operates safely at 240 V. The plug must be adapted to AS/NZS 3112. There is no mandatory EESS-style electrical safety certification in Fiji, but compliance with AS/NZS electrical safety standards (AS/NZS 62368.1 or equivalent) is expected good practice and may be required by importers.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证在斐济不被认可。按中国220V/50Hz及A/I型插头设计和认证的产品，须重新评估以满足斐济240V/50Hz供电及AS/NZS 3112 I型插头要求。应核验电压容差，确保产品在240V下安全运行。插头须改装符合AS/NZS 3112。斐济没有相当于EESS的强制电气安全认证制度，但符合AS/NZS电气安全标准（AS/NZS 62368.1或等效标准）是公认的良好做法，进口商也可能提出此要求。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證在斐濟不被認可。按中國220V/50Hz及A/I型插頭設計和認證的產品，須重新評估以滿足斐濟240V/50Hz供電及AS/NZS 3112 I型插頭要求。應核驗電壓容差，確保產品在240V下安全運行。插頭須改裝符合AS/NZS 3112。斐濟沒有相當於EESS的強制電氣安全認證制度，但符合AS/NZS電氣安全標準（AS/NZS 62368.1或等效標準）是公認的良好做法，進口商也可能提出此要求。

mandatory_status.target: No formal mandatory electrical safety certification scheme in Fiji equivalent to EESS/RCM; 240 V / 50 Hz rated and AS/NZS 3112 Type I plug conformance required; AS/NZS electrical safety standards are expected good practice
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC electrical safety certification for products in the CCC catalogue in China; 220 V / 50 Hz and GB plug standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety approval is not recognised in Fiji. Products must be rated and safe for 240 V / 50 Hz and use a Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plug. No EESS-equivalent mandatory certification exists in Fiji, but AS/NZS electrical safety standard compliance is expected practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全认证在斐济不被认可。产品须经过240V/50Hz额定和安全认证，并使用I型（AS/NZS 3112）插头。斐济无相当于EESS的强制认证，但须符合AS/NZS电气安全标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全認證在斐濟不被認可。產品須經過240V/50Hz額定和安全認證，並使用I型（AS/NZS 3112）插頭。斐濟無相當於EESS的強制認證，但須符合AS/NZS電氣安全標準。
